name: Icon Callout Box Section
description: Light-blue accent-shape box with a short blue headline and a white icon badge straddling the box's left edge (50/50 over blue and page background). Used for supporting proof-point statements. Includes Outlook degrade caveats.
notes: Outlook (Word engine) ignores position:absolute — badge drops to top-left flush inner edge. Brand-safe option: pre-composite badge as transparent PNG or bake into box background image with live text. Every other rule stays identical.
